verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If words could describe just how I feel inside, I'd write a song concerning my dear Lord; The words would be beyond compare to any ever heard, That glorify the One that I adore.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But my words could not explain Just why He bore our shame, No praise could quite convey the love He's shown. My song could never fill the heart of a hungry, thirsty soul, But the Spirit in God's Word could make men whole.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's the Spirit, the Holy Spirit, It's the Spirit in God's Word that makes men whole; It's the Spirit, the Holy Spirit, Why don't you let God's Spirit fill your soul? (Just let God's Spirit fill your soul!)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If Love could project starting within His Bride, The reasons for Her fears would all subside, If She partakes that robe of white, dressed in all His grace The Love of Christ would shine upon Her face;

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But Her Love can not be known if Christ is never shown, The Life in which the Love in Her has grown; Her Love could never win the heart of a lost & lonely soul But the Spirit in Her words can make men whole.
